<blockquote>[[File:Fisher dog talent.gif|thumb|Shakey shaky fishy fishy~]]Whenever your Dog enters the water, it '''may catch a [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Fish Fish]''' which it will '''give you when it shakes itself dry'''. 


The '''chance''' of catching a Fish '''increase with level''', 

and any points in [[Hell Hound|'''Hell Hound''']] can cause the Fish to be '''cooked'''. 


'''Mastering''' this skill will allow your Dog to '''breathe underwater'''.</blockquote>

== Trivia ==

* It was added in the original DT
